channel.title: Antepenultimate
channel.description: Welcome to Joseph Rowe's personal website.

item.title: Top 1 First Posts on My New Website
item.description: Learn all about the top first posts on my new website, including nothing.

item.title: Snakes Aren't That Scary: Python for Content Marketers
item.description: Learn why marketers should learn Python, even if they have no interest in programming.
